testcase.name: [1:8] Customer Login

failure.message: http call failed after 5358 milliseconds for url: http://192.168.0.182:8080/parabank/services/bank/login/john/demo classpath:org/udea/parabank/login.feature:12

testcase.name: [1:14] Successful Transfer
